name: Old-Fashioned Peach Cobbler
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F. Lightly grease an 8 x 8 x 2-inch baking dish.
Combine brown sugar, cinnamon, lemon rind and juice in a large bowl. Add peaches; toss to mix. Transfer to prepared baking dish.
2. On a piece of waxed paper, combine flour and baking powder. In a medium-sized bowl, beat together butter and egg whites until light and fluffy. Beat in the remaining ingredients alternately, stirring just to combine. Drop batter by spoonfuls over peach mixture; spread gently.
3. Bake in the preheated oven for 25 to 30 minutes or until peaches are tender and crust is golden brown. Serve warm.
